# Requirements for Contributing a Performance Improvement

* Complete the template below. Pull requests without enough context to review may be closed until the required information is provided.
* This template is only for performance improvements to existing functionality. For other changes, use the appropriate template from [.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE](https://github.com/Sofiane-77/PSChristmasTree/tree/main/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE).
* All status checks must pass before a maintainer reviews the pull request. See [.github/CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Sofiane-77/PSChristmasTree/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests) for the current workflow.

## Description of the Change

<!--

Describe the design of the improvement clearly enough that a maintainer who has not worked in this area recently can still review it with confidence.

-->

```none
```

Describe the exact performance improvement observed, such as reduced execution time or lower memory use. Explain how you measured it.
